headline: American Tower Tests AI Edge Use Case As Investors Weigh Growth Path
summary: Dispersive Holdings completed a successful pilot with an American Tower Edge Data Center, focused on AI and high-performance edge workloads. The pilot delivered improvements in throughput, security, and resiliency for regional GPU and edge deployments. This development adds a new AI and edge computing angle to American Tower’s existing tower and data center business. For investors tracking American Tower (NYSE:AMT), the Dispersive Holdings pilot comes as the stock trades around $186.64...

headline: American Tower (AMT) Initiated at Bernstein as Firm Highlights Global Tower Portfolio
summary: American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 5, Bernstein initiated coverage of American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) with a Market Perform rating. The firm set a $205 price target on the stock.
